case_number: constitutional petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-533 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on Office Objections at "A". 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 10.03.2022 Mr. Abdul Rahman A. Bhutto, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Bashir Ahmed Dargahi, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 7. Mr. Muhammad Imran Abbasi, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. ------ Comments have been filed on behalf of respondents, those are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to the learned counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same does not press the instant constitutional petition for the time being by contending that he would file the same afresh on event of need. The instant constitutional petition is dismissed as not pressed. The petitioner may file the fresh petition, if it is permitted by law. Judge
